# Repo2Brainrot - Video Generation Dependencies
# Install: pip install -r requirements.txt
# Also requires:
#   - ffmpeg (system-level, must be on PATH)
#   - espeak-ng (system-level, for Kokoro phonemizer fallback)
#     Windows: https://github.com/espeak-ng/espeak-ng/releases

kokoro>=0.9.4
soundfile
torch>=2.0.0
torchaudio>=2.0.0
numpy
Pillow>=10.0.0
